name: Research Clinical Figure
description: Nature Medicine / Science style clinical research figures with patient cohorts, survival curves, and performance metrics.
template:
Create a {prompt}

Style requirements:
- Nature Medicine / Science Translational Medicine style
- Soft literature-science palette: muted teal, dusty blue, soft coral, pale sand
- Clean 4-panel academic figure labeled A–D with small bold panel letters
- White background, light gray axes, thin lines, ample margins
- No neon colors, no dark background, Nature journal figure aesthetics
- Readable labels, precise arrows, subtle gridlines
- No decorative clutter, no fake logos, no watermark

Density control:
- 4-6 major visual elements per panel
- Each element should have clear scientific purpose
- Use whitespace as breathing room
- One clear focal point per panel with supporting context
